title: Group Members Response Schema
description: A flat array of member users, shared by GET /admin/groups/{id}/users and GET /admin/roles/{id}/users. One schema because the two shapes are identical (the frontend reads both as one IMemberUser type). No pagination — a single group's / role's membership is expected to be small. A missing group/role is a 404, not an empty array; an existing one with no visible members returns []. Members are scoped to the same visible set as the users list (intern = false, id_status > 0), so these screens agree with the Users page about who exists.

email.description: User email (the column is NOT NULL for persisted users, but the getter is nullable)

status.description: userStatus lookup code (active/invited/interested/auto_created), same vocabulary as the users list; null if unset
